narrative:
Granville Township East (precinct in Mercer County) has 539 registered voters, with 44.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 51.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 48.4 percentage points.
